title: Signal Studio
tagline: Editorial portfolio platform for a boutique design agency.
summary: A modern brand storytelling site with layered sections, motion-inspired layouts, and a reusable marketing component system.
description: Signal Studio was designed to help a creative agency present case studies, services, and lead capture content through a premium editorial interface. The project focused on visual hierarchy, accessible contrast, and responsive storytelling blocks that scale cleanly across screen sizes.
features: Modular marketing sections for services, process, and case study storytelling
Responsive navigation with mobile drawer and sticky CTA treatment
Accessible layout system with strong heading structure and focus states
Reusable card patterns for testimonials, project highlights, and contact prompts
metrics: 34% stronger lead-capture conversion in the concept benchmark
95+ lighthouse score target across performance and accessibility
Single codebase optimized for desktop, tablet, and mobile launch

title: Northstar Dashboard
tagline: Operations dashboard for a distributed product team.
summary: A data-focused interface concept balancing dense information with quick scanning, status clarity, and responsive layout rules.
description: Northstar Dashboard rethinks how internal teams monitor launches, sprint health, and campaign status. The product detail work prioritized card hierarchy, metric emphasis, and flexible dashboard regions that stay usable even on smaller screens.
features: Adaptive dashboard grid with metric cards, trends, and team snapshots
Status badge system for releases, blockers, and sprint health
Compact visual language for tables, charts, and quick actions
Filter-friendly architecture ready for API-backed data
metrics: Reduced visual clutter by grouping related insight panels
Responsive shell tested for touch devices and laptop breakpoints
Prepared component structure for long-term product scaling

title: Harbor Commerce
tagline: Lifestyle storefront concept for curated home goods.
summary: A polished ecommerce experience with product storytelling, collection highlights, and a warm visual system built for trust.
description: Harbor Commerce blends editorial storytelling with a conversion-friendly storefront. The experience uses rich collection imagery, strong spacing, and product discovery sections that guide customers from inspiration to checkout.
features: Collection-led homepage with editorial banners and trust-building product detail sections
Reusable merchandising cards and product category spotlights
Mobile-first layout with simplified navigation and CTA hierarchy
SEO-conscious page structure with semantic content blocks
metrics: Improved product discoverability with clearer category framing
Built to support static deployment and future CMS integration
Consistent component patterns across landing and catalog pages
